description:
Transportation planners simulate the adoption of Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) by altering microscopic car-following models in traffic software. For the Bologna Acosta network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/), compare the baseline traffic performance against an AV scenario where passenger vehicles are configured with the Intelligent Driver Model (IDM) and a tau value of 0.8. Generate trip information outputs for the baseline scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos_baseline.xml and for the AV scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos_av.xml. Create a text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/av_comparison.txt containing the mean duration of all completed vehicle trips for both scenarios and the calculated difference (Baseline - AV). The report must contain exactly these three lines with values to two decimal places:

Baseline Avg Duration: <value>
AV Avg Duration: <value>
Difference (Baseline - AV): <value>
